notes: Launches with music, but just sits there at main menu.  Hitting enter to start a new game makes a sound, but it never happens.  Alt-tabbing out and back in does nothing either.
title: Omikron: The Nomad Soul

notes: The screen startups with the background frozen and nothing is able to be selected. The music plays in the background but frozen. Only way to stop the process is to kill -9 on the Runtime.exe that Omikron starts.
title: Omikron: The Nomad Soul

notes:
Install custom proton that handles 32-bit prefixes like proton-tkg or https://github.com/GloriousEggroll/proton-ge-custom/releases Go to steamlibrary/compatdata/243000 (or create it) and remove all files from there. In this directory type in terminal 
" WINEPREFIX=$PWD/pfx WINEARCH=win32 winecfg "
and set Windows compatibility version to Windows 98.

Performance - OK
No glitches visible in comparison to windows version without dgvoodoo

Problems: 
- Alt+F4 will close window, but process will remain with music still on, needs to be killed from system. 
- 1080p resolution of my screen is being overwritten to some lower value at every launch and it's need to be set again with every launch.
- Sometimes, usually with resolution change game will break and I had to remove prefix and create it again to be able to launch it.
- When something 2D is layered on top of screen (like Nomad Soul logo) graphics freezes until it disappears
- Inventory isn't working (it can be closed with tab button, but it's unusable). I remember that I had similar problem on Windows but I don't remember what I have done back then to fix it (dgvoodoo maybe)
- From what I can remember game launches with cinematics - apparently not here.
title: Omikron: The Nomad Soul

notes: Download dgvoodoo. http://www.dege.freeweb.hu/dgVoodoo2/dgVoodoo2.html Unpack dlls from MS/x86 to game directory. Run override all 4 dlls either in command params or via winecfg on game prefix. Only thing that doesn't work is video playback, but there are only 3 clips at game launch with logos, so not much of an issue.
title: Omikron: The Nomad Soul

notes:
As a other user said, works fine after adding dgvoodoo. Without that the game stuck at main menu. 
I didn't notice any crashes or random freezes after 6+ hours of gameplay.
title: Omikron: The Nomad Soul
